name: sbom marks the attestation unsigned and claims no provenance when no signing key is available
command: printf '%s' '{"dependencies":{"lodash":"4.17.21","express":"4.18.0"}}' > package.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/sbom.sh" --root . --sign 2>e.txt; grep -q 'attestation=unsigned' e.txt && echo h15-unsigned 1>&2
